pages.title: Amor De Verdad
pages.tagline: Reject illusions. Demand the truth in this raw confessional.

pages.body: This midtempo Latin alt-R&B track strips away cinematic glamour to reveal a gritty, vulnerable core. A raw female vocal with emotional cracks navigates internal conflict and suppressed fear over edgy dark pop production. Saturated sub-bass anchors punchy trap-inflected drums while stark guitar and Rhodes stabs weave through atmospheric pads. It is an intimate plea rejecting performative gestures in favor of authentic connection that endures beyond the heat of passion. The journey moves from trembling anticipation to explosive rejection, demanding genuine presence over empty promises.
pages.styleSentence: A midtempo (100 BPM) Latin alt-R&B track featuring a raw female vocal with emotional cracks over edgy dark pop production, saturated sub-bass, punchy trap-inflected drums, and stark guitar/Rhodes stabs weaving through atmospheric pads.

pages.text:
[Intro]
Me llamaste a las tres
y yo también temblé

[Verse 1]
Dijiste que temblabas, que no lo esperabas
yo sentí lo mismo, pero me callé
no me hables a las tres si en la mañana te vas
quédate también cuando salga el sol

[Pre-Chorus]
No me amarres con un beso y una piel
no quiero el poder, quiero saber que vas a volver

[Chorus]
Ay, mi amor, no me preguntes
cuál es la receta, no hay ninguna, solo ven
yo no quiero amor de cine
quiero el que se queda cuando todo se apaga otra vez
eres lindo como el agua, pero el agua se va con el calor
yo no quiero amor de cine
quiero amor del de verdad

[Verse 2]
No me des mil horas que se inventan
no me armes desfiles que después se van
si soy tu gasolina, no me quemes y ya
dime si somos dos o solo cuando te conviene a ti

[Bridge]
No vendas tu alma, guárdala pa' ti
no corras diez mil kilómetros por mí
solo cruza la calle cuando te llame a las tres
los héroes de película no se quedan al final

[Final Chorus]
yo no quiero amor de cine
quiero el que se queda...
quédate
quédate

[Outro]
Somos uno... ¿o somos dos?
quédate y lo sabré

pages.caption: Cinematic illusions dissolve into gritty urban reality where only true presence survives the fading light and cooling water.

pages.vocalStyle: confessional, intimate female vocal with slight rasp

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Pours emotional cracks through every raw confession with a raspy whisper.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers soft harmonies to widen the intimate space without filling it completely.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Delivers punchy trap beats that drive the rhythm forward relentlessly.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Saturates low frequencies with deep sub-bass rumble for heavy impact.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves atmospheric pads around stark stabs to create moody textures.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Scatters ambient debris and urban noise across the sonic landscape freely.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Plays sharp, rhythmic chords that cut through the mix with clarity.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Adds warm Rhodes tones that blend seamlessly with melodic lines.

levels.name: EXPLOSIVE TRUTH
levels.emotion: Explosive rejection of illusions for truth

levels.name: ANGRY REALIZATION
levels.emotion: Angry realization of futility in empty promises

levels.name: FINAL RESIGNATION
levels.emotion: Resigned vulnerability and final plea for presence
